headline: Deep-water peach today before Friday thunderstorms arrive
weather_notes: Water potato_bags today — 87°F heat with 3 days since last irrigation drains bag soil faster than raised beds, and Friday's 33% storm chance is not a reliable substitute.
Hold irrigation after today — Friday night through Saturday brings 49–58% rain probability that should recharge all beds.
Check and tighten e1–e4 tomato cage ties before Friday — gusty thunderstorms arrive Friday afternoon on 19-day-old transplants.

surfaced_tasks.title: Deep water the peach tree Thursday
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due today and logged struggling May 23 — 87°F with 3 dry days is peak stress window before Friday rain breaks the drought.
